task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the initial Observation log for rootworm damage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a log form with Name 'Rootworm damage assessment - Field 12', Log Type 'Observation', Date '10/08/2025', Time '7:00 AM', and Notes mentioning rootworm beetle counts. The 'Done' toggle must be OFF (grey).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Input log for the Bifenthrin application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a log form with Name 'Bifenthrin 2EC application - Field 12', Log Type 'Input', Date '10/08/2025', Time '10:00 AM', and Notes mentioning Bifenthrin 2EC and EPA Reg 279-3206. The 'Done' toggle must be ON (blue).

task_completion.description: Verify the Observation log was re-opened, edited, and marked as Done.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Rootworm damage assessment - Field 12' log form showing the appended text ' TREATMENT APPLIED see Bifenthrin 2EC log. Re-scout 10-14 days.' at the end of the notes. The 'Done' toggle must now be ON (blue).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Activity log for sprayer decontamination.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a log form with Name 'Sprayer decontamination and storage', Log Type 'Activity', Date '10/08/2025', Time '1:30 PM', and Notes mentioning triple rinse and TeeJet XR11003. The 'Done' toggle must be ON (blue).

task_completion.description: Verify the login form is filled out correctly but not submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the farmOS login screen. The Server URL field should show 'cropguard.iastate.edu/farmos' (after the pre-filled https://), Username 'j.hansen', and Password 'Sc0ut2025!'. The form should be visible on screen, indicating it was not submitted.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Share My Location' is disabled in the navigation menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the app's navigation drawer/menu. The 'Share My Location' toggle must be in the OFF (grey) position.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual farmOS Field Kit Android application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the farmOS Field Kit UI (Tasks list, Edit Log forms, Navigation drawer, Login screen) rather than a text editor, terminal, or web browser.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not tap the Log In button.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show the login form filled out or the navigation drawer open, but no error messages or loading screens indicating an attempted login to the fictional server.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent navigated the UI to create and edit logs rather than using programmatic shortcuts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps like the date/time pickers, dropdown menus for Log Type, and the keyboard open for typing notes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The app is the farmOS Field Kit Android app. Log types available in the dropdown are Activity, Harvest, Input, Observation. The date field uses MM/DD/YYYY format (10/08/2025) in the form and displays as 'Oct 8, 2025' in the list. The time picker uses Hour/Min numeric fields with AM/PM radio buttons. The 'Done' toggle and 'Share My Location' toggle are ON (blue) by default and OFF when grey. The Login screen has an 'https://' prefix pre-filled for the URL field. The final state of the Tasks list should show 3 logs: OBSERVATION, INPUT, and ACTIVITY, all dated Oct 8, 2025, and all marked Done.
